entry.title: Problem MMCL for batch 023
entry.content:
Hi.
When I use MMCL to 002 to change equipment characteristics. It's ok. However, when I make for batch 023. I have the message: no value.

Regards.

entry.title: Copy sales order to sales order with reference in S4 HANA Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

We can able to copy the order by using of 'create with references' options like below

- Create from Quotation

- Create from Contract

But how to enable the option of 'Create from Order' ?

For reference, please see the attachment.

Any idea? Please guide us.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Hiding / Disabling window in SAPScript
entry.content:
In case anyone is looking, this is how to remove a Window. Call just before the CLOSE_FORM function module:

CONSTANTS lc_page_windows(25) TYPE c VALUE '(SAPLSTXC)PAGE_WINDOWS[]'.
DATA: ls_page_windows TYPE itcth.
* =======================================================
ASSIGN (lc_page_windows) TO field-symbols(<fs_page_windows>).
IF <fs_page_windows> IS ASSIGNED.
	READ TABLE <fs_page_windows> INTO ls_page_windows WITH KEY tdwindow = 'window_name_here'.
	IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
		DELETE TABLE <fs_page_windows> FROM ls_page_windows.
	ENDIF.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Impex mode
entry.content: The question was about adding items at the beginning of the list. Is there a "prepend" mode?

entry.title: Re: Asynchronus error on synchronus activity.
entry.content:
Hello,

Seems this is corrected.

Could you please advise guys when you do some corrections.

entry.title: Re: How to configure Custom Workflow Email notification in SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am following this article as I want to send custom email notification upon Save of a custom MDF.

Unfortunately the Direct mappings are not working.

Is that even supported?

The custom email notification is working, but only the Reference mappings are working.

This looks more like a bug than a not supported issue.

entry.title: Payment Medium Formats Country Chile - S/4Hana Public
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to know and confirm if inside the Chile localization, there are payment forms for banks, for example BANCO BCI, BANCO SANTANDER, BANCO ITAU.

If the answers are not positive, is there any guide to create these formats?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: EDID4 Data record table's number of fields not constant across different systems
entry.content: RFC and SAP GUI for Java are definitely the wrong tags for this question. EDID4 belongs to the ALE framework. I'm adding the ALE tag, maybe someone from there can answer this question.

entry.title: Re: Process Documentation Template SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Hi Dennis,

The export pdf feature was something I was not aware of, thank you for sharing 😊

My question was about a different feature (Process Documentation Report in SAP Process Manager), I've added an image to the original post for clarification. I was wondering if this report can also be downloaded in the SAP Collaboration Hub?

Thank you, 
Annaliese

entry.title: Custom CDS View with several dependencies deprecated
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

The Primary Datasource of a CDS view is deprecated and we are having several CDS views that are dependent on this view that also have CDS views that are dependent on this. There is no way to just replace the primary data source without causing issues for the other CDS views?

 

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS View with several dependencies deprecated
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Due to stability reasons it is not possible to change a used Custom CDS View in an incompatible way. Exchanging the primary data source would very likely break the dependent other Custom CDS Views and hence breaking your Key User extensibility scenario.

Therefore we propose to replace the now deprecated data source step-by-step: You can create a copy of the first Custom CDS View and replace the deprecated data source in that way. Then step-by-step you replace the original Custom CDS View with the copied one.

We know this approach might be cumbersome, but stability is one of the main criteria of Key User extensibility.

 

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Recruiting Marketing Advanced Analytics Referral Source
entry.content:
Is there an option to run a report of which candidates list referral as their source? I don't see it in the analytics but maybe I'm missing it. 

In the meantime, I've submitted an influence portal idea. Please go vote on it! 
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/318068

entry.title: SAC message UQM_OPTIMIZED_USER_FRIENDLY_PERFORMANCE
entry.content:
Dear all,

in the SAC console I get the following message in the F12 console:

2024-02-29T20:28:42.377Z [ERROR] Feature toggle 'UQM_OPTIMIZED_USER_FRIENDLY_PERFORMANCE' does not exist but its state was requested

 

How can I get rid of this messge ?

entry.title: SIGNAVIO-Process Manager: Process Chain automatic creation
entry.content:
Hello,

I have many bpmn diagrams created in our Signavio workspace, but I would like to known if is there any feature that "read" these diagrams and create another one Value Chain diagram with all subprocess that are in bpmn diagram?

Tks in advanced for any suggestion

Tiago Cassiano

SAP Signavio Process Manager

entry.title: Re: Production Version
entry.content:
Hi,

I think you don't need to create PV because PV you have to assign to the Material in MRP4 view and from there it picks up automatically

You can go for Order splitting

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/34de0103497c4b80a7c7fbf6952ff971/9400b753128eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html#

and Under function--> Order Split.

entry.title: Excess POs and less sales demand
entry.content:
Hi,

We have excess Purchase orders in some cases with no customer order and some cases only with few customer orders.  This is creating excess inventory issue. COuld someone please tell me from which transaction or report exactly I can check in SAP where we have too much Purchase orders placed and less demand?

Would appreacitae your help. Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay Mass Update Job - Not updating # of days...
entry.content:
Hi,

After rescheduling the jobs in provisioning, the issue was fixed and the # of days got calculated correctly. 

This can be closed.

entry.title: Re: scale format hide - sap analytic cloud
entry.content:
The problem is the first and the third columns are scale thousands and i dont want the word thousands to appear

The 2nd column should be without scale 

Is it possible to remove the words thousands from thee 1st and 3rd columns?

entry.title: Re: scale format hide - sap analytic cloud
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: Personas - hidden tabs still showing in SAPGui but ok...
entry.content:
Thanks for quick response, appreciate your help.

To clarify - We have hidden tabs in MM02.   However if you click the 'enter' key to move from one tab to the next, it stops on the hidden tab.

In Webgui - the tab is greyed out and a message shown 'this tab cannot be displayed'.   User must hit enter to move past this tab to the next one.   For example, we've hidden Accounting 2 tab.   User clicks enter from accounting 1, it shows accounting 2 with message 'this tab cannot be displayed', user clicks enter to move to Costing 1.

Ideally, if the tab is hidden, the flavour would automatically skip it, but as it's not, we created a script to click enter key on behalf of user and assigned it to the 'on enter' script event.    

Initially, it seems to be a personas issue, as would not expect to need script to skip the hidden tab.  However, if script is required, the script works in webgui, but when we test in sapgui and Business Client, the script does not work, behaviour is to ignore the script and show the hidden tabs. 

Script:

const Screens = [
[1,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP01/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2004/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1002/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP01").visible],
[2,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP02/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2004/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1002/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP02").visible],
[4,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP04/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1004/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP04").visible],
[5,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP05/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1004/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP05").visible],
[6,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP06/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP06").visible],
[7,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP07/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2004/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP07").visible],
[8,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP08/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2010/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1004/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP08").visible],
[9,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP09/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP09").visible],
[10,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP10/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB2:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP10").visible],
[11,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP11/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2010/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1002/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP11").visible],
[12,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP12/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP12").visible],
[13,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP13/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP13").visible],
[14,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP14/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP14").visible],
[15,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP15/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1005/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP15").visible],
[17,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP17/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP17").visible],
[19,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP19/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1005/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP19").visible],
[20,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP20/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1005/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP20").visible],
[21,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP21/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1011/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP21").visible],
[22,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP22/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1006/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP22").visible],
[23,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP23/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP23").visible],
[24,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP24/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1008/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP24").visible],
[25,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP25/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1008/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP25").visible],
[26,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP26/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1009/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP26").visible],
[27,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP27/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1009/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP27").visible],
[28,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP28/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1001/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP28").visible],
[29,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP29/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1005/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP29").visible],
[30,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP30/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2000/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1002/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP30").visible],
[31,"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP31/ssubTABFRA1:SAPLMGMM:2004/subSUB1:SAPLMGD1:1002/ctxtRMMG1-MATNR",session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSPR1/tabpSP31").visible]]
function ScreenNumber() {
        for ( let i = 0; i< Screens.length;i++) {
            if (session.idExists(Screens[i][1])) {
            return [Screens[i][1].slice(29,31),i]
        }}return ["na",-1]
        }
function NextScreen() {



    var x = ScreenNumber()[1];
    var flag = true;
    var text = '';
    while (flag && x < Screens.length-1) {
        x += 1;

        if (Screens[x][2]) {
            flag = false;
            break;

        }

}

if (ScreenNumber()[1] == x){return false;} else{

if (!flag) {
session.findById(Screens[x][1].slice(0,31)).select()
}
return true;}
}

return NextScreen();

entry.title: Re: Problem MMCL for batch 023
entry.content:
Cześć, Artur.

I suggest you post this in the ERP Q&A area https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/qa-p/erp-questions rather than here in the Application Development interest group.

Regards
-Vitaliy

entry.title: Business Application Studio doesn't work with AVG
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I installed the AVG antivirus on my machine, then accessed the BAS and tried to create a new project using templates. It presented me with the errors below when I debugged. I tested it on a machine without AVG and it worked. Has anyone experienced this situation before? Did you manage to resolve it without removing AVG? How?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: S4HANA ON PREMISE 1610 - Append structure to MSEG
entry.content:
We have to firstly create structure which can be used to append in MATDOC + MSEG

e.g. i created it for field SBATCH.

Now refer same structure & append it in MATDOC & MSEG

activate it

In MSEG do append structure but it won't get activated until we extend View NSDM_E_MSEG

Now finally create extension of view NSDM_E_MSEG

And activate extended view & mseg.

This will work.

entry.title: InfoObject Date Format
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In my aDSO, there is a custom date InfoObject formatted as DDMMYYYY. However, in the query section, users need to filter this InfoObject by MMYYYY.

How would you approach to solving this problem?

Can you help us?

 

Thanks,

André Gustavo

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
entry.content: Task & Bonus. Played around with @title and @Common.Label as well for fun.

entry.title: Re: Object Table Context Menu Items
entry.content: This issue has been fixed in the editor.

entry.title: The Indispensable Role of SAP Basis Consultants in the Rise with SAP Era
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving landscape of enterprise technology, SAP remains a cornerstone for countless businesses worldwide. With the introduction of "Rise with SAP," a comprehensive offering aimed at helping businesses transform into intelligent enterprises, the need for skilled professionals has never been more critical. Among these professionals, SAP Basis consultants play a pivotal role in ensuring the seamless operation and optimization of SAP landscapes. Let's delve into why SAP Basis consultants are indispensable for businesses embarking on their journey with Rise with SAP.

Understanding SAP Basis:

Before delving into the significance of SAP Basis consultants in the Rise with SAP era, it's essential to grasp the role of SAP Basis itself. SAP Basis forms the foundation for all SAP applications, managing the technical infrastructure and providing support for various modules and functionalities. From installation and configuration to performance monitoring and system maintenance, SAP Basis consultants are responsible for keeping SAP environments running smoothly.

### Rise with SAP: A Transformational Journey:

Rise with SAP represents a paradigm shift in how businesses approach their digital transformation journey. It offers a holistic solution encompassing business process optimization, cloud migration, and intelligent technologies like AI and machine learning. As organizations embrace this transformative approach, the role of SAP Basis consultants becomes even more crucial.

The Need for SAP Basis Consultants in Rise with SAP:

1. Infrastructure Management: With Rise with SAP's focus on cloud migration and infrastructure modernization, SAP Basis consultants are instrumental in architecting, deploying, and managing cloud-based SAP environments. Their expertise ensures the efficient utilization of cloud resources and the seamless integration of on-premises and cloud systems.

2. Performance Optimization:As businesses leverage advanced technologies to enhance their operations, SAP Basis consultants play a vital role in optimizing system performance. They fine-tune configurations, monitor resource utilization, and implement best practices to ensure optimal performance and scalability, thereby maximizing the benefits of Rise with SAP.

3. Security and Compliance: In an era of increasing cybersecurity threats and regulatory requirements, SAP Basis and Security consultants are tasked with safeguarding SAP systems against vulnerabilities and ensuring compliance with industry standards. They implement robust security measures, conduct regular audits, and provide guidance on data protection, helping organizations mitigate risks and protect their sensitive information.

4. Integration and Innovation:Rise with SAP emphasizes the integration of SAP solutions with third-party applications and emerging technologies. SAP Basis consultants facilitate seamless integration by configuring interfaces, managing middleware components, and collaborating with developers to enable innovation and unlock new possibilities for businesses.

Conclusion:

As businesses embark on their journey with Rise with SAP, the role of SAP Basis consultants emerges as indispensable. From infrastructure management to performance optimization and security, SAP Basis consultants form the backbone of SAP operations, enabling organizations to unleash the full potential of their digital transformation initiatives. In the dynamic landscape of enterprise technology, investing in skilled SAP Basis talent is not just a necessity but a strategic imperative for success in the Rise with SAP era

entry.title: Re: Personas - hidden tabs still showing in SAPGui but ok...
entry.content:
That "this tab cannot be displayed" message is a strange one... I don't remember seeing it yet. However, it is true that if the tab is hidden, then it is not supposed to show up at all in a browser, greyed out or not. So, just to verify: Do you have absolutely no required fields in that hidden tab under any circumstances that could remain unpopulated?
Also, what Personas SP are you working with and are you fully up to date with all notes?

entry.title: Re: Error loading webview In Business Application Studio :
entry.content: Check if your computer has the AVG antivirus. I'm having this issue because of AVG; when I removed it, it worked.

entry.title: Re: SEN. Bad recognition during recording SAP GUI
entry.content: You are very welcome, Dmitry. Correct, the custom scaling support is mentioned in SEN manuals, but.... it still doesn't work properly in some cases, so I prefer to use 100%.

entry.title: Seamlessly Integrating SAPUI5 with SAP Backend Systems: Empowering Modern Web Applications with Ente
entry.content:
Understanding SAPUI5

Before delving into integration with SAP backend systems, let's briefly understand SAPUI5. SAPUI5 is a comprehensive UI development toolkit for building web applications that adhere to SAP's Fiori design principles. It provides a rich set of pre-built UI controls, data binding capabilities, and robust support for responsive design, making it an ideal choice for developing enterprise-grade applications.

Integration with SAP ERP

SAP ERP serves as the backbone of many organizations, managing core business processes such as finance, supply chain, and human resources. SAPUI5 seamlessly integrates with SAP ERP through various mechanisms such as OData services, RFC (Remote Function Call), and BAPIs (Business Application Programming Interfaces). Developers can leverage SAPUI5's data binding capabilities to consume data from SAP ERP and display it within web applications. Additionally, SAPUI5 offers built-in support for SAP's authentication mechanisms, ensuring secure communication between the front-end and backend systems.

Leveraging SAP S/4HANA

SAP S/4HANA, SAP's next-generation ERP suite, provides real-time analytics, predictive capabilities, and streamlined processes to drive digital transformation. SAPUI5 is fully compatible with SAP S/4HANA, allowing developers to build intuitive user interfaces that leverage the advanced features of the platform. With SAPUI5's support for Fiori elements, developers can create consistent and visually appealing applications that align with SAP's Fiori design guidelines. Furthermore, SAPUI5's modular architecture enables easy extensibility, allowing developers to enhance existing S/4HANA applications with custom functionality.

Integration with SAP Cloud Platform

SAP Cloud Platform serves as a robust platform-as-a-service (PaaS) offering from SAP, providing developers with a comprehensive set of tools and services for building, deploying, and managing cloud-based applications. SAPUI5 seamlessly integrates with SAP Cloud Platform, enabling developers to build scalable and resilient web applications that leverage cloud-based services such as SAP HANA, SAP Fiori Launchpad, and SAP Business Application Studio. With SAPUI5's support for multi-environment deployment, developers can deploy applications to SAP Cloud Platform with ease, ensuring seamless integration with SAP backend systems.

Best Practices for Integration

When integrating SAPUI5 with SAP backend systems, it's essential to follow best practices to ensure optimal performance, security, and maintainability. Some best practices include:

  • Use asynchronous programming techniques to prevent blocking UI threads and improve responsiveness.
  • Implement error handling and exception logging to gracefully handle communication errors and unexpected behavior.
  • Utilize caching mechanisms to reduce round-trip times and improve application performance.
  • Follow SAP's security guidelines for authentication, authorization, and data encryption to protect sensitive information.

Conclusion

SAPUI5 provides developers with a powerful toolkit for building modern web applications that seamlessly integrate with SAP backend systems such as SAP ERP, SAP S/4HANA, and SAP Cloud Platform. By leveraging SAPUI5's rich feature set and best practices for integration, developers can unlock the full potential of enterprise data, empowering organizations to drive innovation and achieve business success in today's digital economy.

entry.title: Understanding SAP CPQ: Streamlining Configure, Price, and Quote Processes
entry.content:
Introduction:
In today's highly competitive business landscape, companies are continuously seeking ways to optimize their sales processes to stay ahead. One critical aspect of this optimization is the Configure, Price, and Quote (CPQ) process, which directly impacts sales efficiency and effectiveness. SAP CPQ (Configure, Price, and Quote) emerges as a robust solution tailored to address the complexities of modern sales environments. In this technical blog, we delve into SAP CPQ, exploring its features, functionalities, benefits, and implementation considerations.

What is SAP CPQ?
SAP CPQ is a cloud-based solution designed to streamline the Configure, Price, and Quote processes for businesses across various industries. It empowers organizations to create accurate quotes, configure complex products/services, and optimize pricing strategies to drive sales performance.

Key Features of SAP CPQ:

1. Product Configuration: SAP CPQ enables users to configure products/services according to customer requirements, considering various attributes, options, and dependencies. This feature ensures accurate configurations, minimizing errors and maximizing customer satisfaction.

2. Dynamic Pricing: With SAP CPQ, businesses can implement dynamic pricing strategies based on factors such as customer segments, competitive pricing analysis, discounts, promotions, and market trends. This flexibility helps organizations remain competitive while maximizing profitability.

3. Quote Management:The platform offers robust capabilities for quote creation, management, and customization. Users can generate professional-looking quotes quickly, incorporating relevant product information, pricing details, terms, and conditions.

4. Integration Capabilities: SAP CPQ seamlessly integrates with other enterprise systems such as CRM (Customer Relationship Management), ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), and e-commerce platforms. This integration ensures data consistency, enhances collaboration, and provides a unified view of customer interactions across the sales cycle.

5. Analytics and Reporting: The solution provides comprehensive analytics and reporting functionalities, offering insights into sales performance, quote-to-cash metrics, customer preferences, and profitability analysis. These insights empower organizations to make data-driven decisions and continuously improve their sales strategies.

Benefits of SAP CPQ:

1. Improved Sales Efficiency: By automating and streamlining the CPQ process, SAP CPQ reduces manual effort, minimizes errors, and accelerates quote generation. This efficiency allows sales teams to focus more on value-added activities such as customer engagement and relationship building.

2. Enhanced Customer Experience: SAP CPQ enables organizations to deliver personalized quotes quickly, based on customer preferences and requirements. This personalized approach enhances the overall customer experience, fostering loyalty and satisfaction.

3. Optimized Pricing Strategies: With dynamic pricing capabilities, SAP CPQ helps businesses optimize pricing strategies to remain competitive while maximizing profitability. Organizations can adapt pricing in real-time based on market dynamics, customer feedback, and business objectives.

4. Scalability and Flexibility:As a cloud-based solution, SAP CPQ offers scalability and flexibility to accommodate evolving business needs and growth requirements. Whether expanding into new markets or adding new product lines, the platform can adapt to changes seamlessly.

5. Compliance and Governance: SAP CPQ provides robust compliance and governance features, ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements, pricing policies, and contractual obligations. This reduces compliance risks and enhances overall business integrity.

Implementation Considerations:

1. Business Process Alignment: Before implementing SAP CPQ, organizations should align the solution with their existing sales processes and workflows. This alignment ensures smooth integration and adoption across the organization.

2. Data Migration and Integration: Proper data migration and integration planning are essential for seamless connectivity between SAP CPQ and other enterprise systems. This includes mapping data fields, ensuring data consistency, and implementing data validation rules.

3. User Training and Adoption: Comprehensive training programs should be conducted to familiarize users with SAP CPQ's features, functionalities, and best practices. User adoption is critical for maximizing the ROI of the solution.

4. Continuous Improvement: Post-implementation, organizations should continuously monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of SAP CPQ. This includes gathering feedback from users, analyzing performance metrics, and identifying areas for optimization and enhancement.

Conclusion:
SAP CPQ emerges as a powerful solution for organizations seeking to streamline their Configure, Price, and Quote processes. By leveraging its advanced features, businesses can enhance sales efficiency, improve customer experience, optimize pricing strategies, and drive overall sales performance. However, successful implementation requires careful planning, alignment with business processes, and a commitment to continuous improvement. With SAP CPQ, organizations can navigate the complexities of modern sales environments with confidence and agility.

entry.title: Re: EDM Profile consumption tolerance limits
entry.content:
hello daniel, mathieu,

few years back but maybe you can assist me and elaborate more on above already helpful answer.

setting up edm consistency check for equivalent to dm outsorting validation (el27) , i hope I am in the correct direction - right?

How does the consistency check process work?

Customizing with function module for the checking. Then, do I need to create as well the _E function module or only the consistency check can do all the activity?

What means outsorting in edm? Do I have to put status = lock in the specific interval? and if so , how i do this? through the consistence check fm or through the error fm ?  

Then, i assume the process is to display these locked intervals in a list for the user to review and release the interval. Which transaction is used for the listing of locked intervals? edm1 or another tcode?

Apologies for the many questions, just trying to figure out the process and setup functions in terms of abap. In terms of customizing i think is clear to me, at the consistency check area to setup external import

thank you in advance,

ioannisf

entry.title: Re: Application and system - a worthless debate?
entry.content:
I have had the same debate when it comes to SLA discussions... is that system availabilty or application availabilty ?
At the end of the day a system is an instance of an application with a unique name or system identifier (SID). Each of the systems that make up a given  SAP landscape is part of an environment or a tier like SBX, Dev, QAS, Pre-prod, Prod etc..

entry.title: CFOP Wrong determination MM
entry.content:
HI,

I have a question regarding the determination of CFOP in J_1BAON, We have a Non-sap integration with SAP that generates a Purchase order and its MIRO invoice for a freight service by BAPI.

The NFe created in J1B1N has partners such as provider (LF), payer (RG), merchant receiver (WE) among others.
In the determination of the CFOP for the material it is taking an incorrect path as it is determining that the freight is within the same state by the configuration of the supplier's master data and determines CFOP 1353, however we require that you take the configuration of the merchandise receiver that go outside the state to determine CFOP 2353.

We require to know if there is any configuration to indicate the J_1B_NF_CFOP_2_DETERMINATION function that the destination category must be taken from the merchandise receiver that is in a different state or to know if there is any function to set the correct CFOP without taking the standard determination.

 

thanks

entry.title: Cannot enable Change Document flag on Data Element
entry.content:
Hello!

I can't activate the Change Document flag/checkbox for some fields, specifically this one in the JEST table.

I need to receive Equipment status changes (table EQUI) in CDHDR and CDPOS, but when I change them, nothing happens. I went to SCDO and added the JEST table to the EQUI change document, but I still can't get the logs. My attempt now is to add the change document to the field I need, but it's inactive.

I also need to see in Change Document tables the WorkOrder status, but it seems that the change logs wont work for object status change.

It also happens with the ILOM_STTXS data element. Why i cannot enable this?

entry.title: ChaRM Public API´s not Found
entry.content:
Hi Support,

We have a need to integrate ChaRM with an external tool and for this we would like to use Public APIs for this purpose.

When researching the subject, I did not find information about the APIs available for ChaRM, only for ITSM as per note: DIGITS - Service Desk Webservice API.

Are there public APIs for Change Request Management available so that I can carry out an integration scenario with an external tool and pass information to these APIs to automate the creation of Request for Changes (SMCR/ZMCR), Urgent Changes (SMHF/ ZMFH) and Normal Corrections (SMMJ/ZMMJ)?

Best PERSON_NAME,

Marcos Aurélio


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ChaRM Public API´s not Found
entry.content:
Hi Marcos,

We don't have explicit APIs from ChaRM side for integration with 3rd party tools. This kind of integration requirement needs to involve consulting service usually. Thus turn to SAP consult service is an option for you for your specific requirement.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Case statement in webi report throwing error
entry.content:
- simplify your multiple-cases-and-values-statement to check if the syntax of a single part is ok and working !
- what is that supposed to do  "end = 1"  ?

entry.title: Re: ****Cross Tab Table alignment formatting help Require...
entry.content:
- set the page-layout to "fit on 1 page"
- set the page-layout to show more than X (default = 20) columns on one page
- set the the width of the number-columns to "automatic" to show the huge numbers

entry.title: Re: REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY and REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY
entry.content:
I need to add more text in the top_of_page, but if I add more text in the top_of_page the screen will become like this
80% height for top of page and 20% for the item report list

currently the top_of_page height is not adjustable

so my solution is to change the REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY to REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY  so the height of top_of_page will become adjustable (see image below)



but my problem is the current design of ALV_LIST , I am not sure if this kind of design is possible in ALV_GRID_DISPLAY


for this object CL_SALV_TABLE
i did not use this because I will need to do more code changes

entry.title: Introduce more about linking vendor and customer to same Business Partner
entry.content:
During migrate your system from ECC to HANA, we need to synchronize all customer and vendor to BP. One of the situation is if the customer and vendor are same entity, we need to link them to same Business Partner.

Error R1367

In the past, we always receive below error:

Consistency error: 
Message no. R1367

This is because our system is checking below:

        a. The Customer and Vendor must be linked through the Customer number field in the Vendor table and the Vendor number field in the customer table.
        b. If the Customer and Vendor have the same Bank Account information (same Country, Bank Key and Bank Account), then the remaining fields for this entry must also match.
        c. The customer and vendor must contain exactly the same Postal Address information.The following fields are also checked :

ADDR_VERSPO_W_O_NOLANGUPCODE1_EXT
FROM_DATEPO_BOX_CITLANGU_ISOPCODE2_EXT
TO_DATEPBOXCIT_NOREGIONPCODE3_EXT
TITLEPO_BOX_REGSORT1PO_BOX
NAMEPOBOX_CTRYSORT2FLOOR
NAME_2PO_CTRYISOEXTENS_1ROOM_NO
NAME_3DELIV_DISEXTENS_2COUNTRY
NAME_4TRANSPZONETIME_ZONECOUNTRYISO
CONV_NAMESTREETTAXJURCODEDELI_SERV_TYPE
C_O_NAMESTREET_NOADDRESS_IDDELI_SERV_NUMBER
CITYSTR_ABBRLANGU_CRCOUNTY_CODE
DISTRICTHOUSE_NOLANGUCRISOCOUNTY
CITY_NOHOUSE_NO2COMM_TYPETOWNSHIP_CODE
DISTRCT_NOHOUSE_NO3ADDR_GROUPTOWNSHIP
CHCKSTATUSSTR_SUPPL1HOME_CITY 
REGIOGROUPSTR_SUPPL2HOMECITYNO 
POSTL_COD1STR_SUPPL3DONT_USE_S 
POSTL_COD2LOCATIONDONT_USE_P 
POSTL_COD3BUILDINGPO_BOX_LOBBY 

If any of above does not meet the requirement, error will occurs.

Improvement of error R1367

Then we have below note which improve the error message.

3088419 - DDIC for Legal Entity BAdI Message (367) Enhancements   

3067086 - Legal Entity BAdI Message (367) Enhancements   

The error message will show in below way:

CVI_LEDH

We also develop a functionality so that we can select the leading object instead of manually change every difference field between customer and vendor.

To realize this functionality, please implement below note :

 3072319 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report

 3088771 - DDIC Changes for Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report

 3082146 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report integration in CVI_CO...

 3081338 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report integration into MDS...

 Then let us look into CVI_LEDH

  • The difference between customer and vendor will get checked in t-code CVI_LEDH, it including address check, tax check, and bank check.

  • If both of the customer and vendor does not synchronize to BP yet, they will get shown in the result of CVI_LEDH.
  • We can select the leading object, which means during synchronize from customer and vendor to BP, the BP will use the data from customer or from vendor. For example, for the sample customer MYCUST71 and vendor MYVEND71, I select customer as leading object for address data, and vendor as leading object for bank data.
  • After selecting, please press save button.

Let us see what will happen during synchronization:

Sample customer MYCUST71, does not maintain bank data.

Sample vendor MYVEND71, maintain one bank data.

And the synchronization options set up in below way.

  • After vendor synchronize to BP, currently the customer does not synchronize to BP. Re-run the t-code, the customer MYCUST71 and vendor MYVEND71 (LIEF) will no longer there.

  • If checking into table CVI_LEDH, we can get below record:

  • Bp has the bank data which get synchronized from vendor

  • Run MDS_LOAD_Cockpit to synchronize customer to BP. The BP then has both customer role and vendor role. And bank data keep no changes.
     

     

  • Customer still does not have bank data

  • At this time, when looking into table CVI_LEDH, the status keeps 03.

     

  • Then I re-run t-code CVI_LEDH, the status change to 05

     

  • Let us see if we change any data at customer side. 

    BP name get changed, but the bank data keeps


     

     

  • If we try to add a new bank data to customer. After it synchronize to BP, it behaves below

     

 Conclusion

You can see that after using functionality CVI_LEDH, if there are difference between customer and vendor, we can select one of it as leading object, after both of them get synchronized to BP, it will not change the data which didn't get selected as leading object. In this case, vendor has same bank information as BP, but customer still keep no bank data.

Please also follow below steps, to make sure customer, vendor and BP data are same.

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT: Business Partner -> Customer
a. Select only Business Partners where customer and vendor are merged into.
b. This step is to synchronize the address, tax data, and bank details of the Business
Partner to the Customer.
c. This step is also required to link the previous vendor Contact Person to customer

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT: Business Partner -> Vendor
a. Select only Business Partners where customer and vendor are merged into.
b. This step is to synchronize the address, tax data, and bank details of the Business
Partner to the Vendor.
c. This step is also required to link the previous customer Contact Person to vendor

Best regards

sherry

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud emails @mail.crm.cloud.sap not getting out
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We have trying out the SAP Sales Cloud version2 and hoping to see if anyone would know why we are not able to get emails from @mail.crm.cloud.sap .  What needs to be done at our end in order to get these emails successfully?  Also wanting to see if SAP has done the required steps to ensure this domain can have a higher delivery rate?  I guess it is reasonable for normal mail servers to think this domain would be some kind of issues. 

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Things I think are cool in the SAP Ariba 2402 Release

legend

ary

legendary

entry.title: Manage SAP HANA Cloud instance on BTP using BTP CLI
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud instances (other environments) can be created and managed using the BTP CLI.

This blog is summarizing the common operations.

Please note: SAP HANA Cloud instances provisioned in the cloud foundry environment cannot be managed by BTP CLI at the time of writing. 

Check my other blog for managing instances in cloud foundry environment.
Manage SAP HANA Cloud instance on BTP using Cloud Foundry CLI 

Prerequisite:

  • Install the BTP CLI on your local machine
  • HANA Cloud Entitlement added in the subaccount
  • Subscribed the hana tools in your subaccount (optional)
  • Use BTP Login to authenticate
  • Use BTP Target to set the default subaccount target

Create HANA Cloud instance (in other environments)

In free tier or production, choose offering name as "hana-cloud". In trial, choose "hana-cloud-trial".

In free tier, choose plan name as "hana-free". In trial or production, choose "hana".

Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp create services/instance --offering-name hana-cloud --plan-name hana-free --name test-db --parameters '{"data": {"memory": 32, "systempassword": "Welcome100."}}'

 

 

 It will start provisioning an instance in "other environment" and soon the new service instance will be visible from BTP cockpit namely "test-db". 
Alternatively, check the service using the BTP CLI, copy the instance id for future reference.

 

 

btp list services/instance

 

 

or

 

 

btp get services/instance --name test-db

 

 

Start/Stop an instance

To stop:
Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"serviceStopped":true}}'

 

 

To start:
Bash/Shell:

 

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"serviceStopped":false}}'

 

 

Update whitelisted IPs

For local/hybrid or cross-region developers, whitelisted IPs are needed to be updated on the instance level for connections.

To open connections from all IPs.
Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"whitelistIPs":["0.0.0.0/0"]}}'

 

 

 

Full list of the supported parameters can be found here.

Delete an instance

Bash/Shell:

 

btp delete services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc

 

Limitations:

  • BTP CLI is not able to manage instances created in Cloud Foundry runtime environment at the time of writing. Cloud Foundry CLI is the command line tool for HANA Cloud instances inside the cloud foundry runtime. See my blog here for details.
  • Instance created using BTP CLI is in "other environments" and able to be managed via the SAP HANA Cloud Central, multi-environment edition.
  • BTP CLI can only be used in subaccount which feature B is enabled.

BTP CLI command reference can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Sync BOMs between 2 plants
entry.content: Is there a way to automate this?

entry.title: Re: Deep inserts to entity sets are not supported in SAP...
entry.content: if you are licensed SAP customer, you could download older SDK versions from https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter. But 5.0 version is out of maintenance. the oldest one you could download is 6.0 now.

entry.title: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Connections for SAP Services (SM59)] SOLMAN 7.2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to configure the SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM. I am done with the other configuration and we already registered our sap router to SAP but I am stuck in this step New OSS: Create HTTPS Connections for SAP Services (SM59). Whenever I tried to test the connection in SM59 I get the error:
NIECONN_REFUSED(-10). Can you help me with this? 
Here is my logs in dev_icm.


[Thr 9452] Fri Mar 1 10:32:10:672 2024
[Thr 9452] ***LOG Q0I=> NiBufIConnect: connection pending after 5000ms: connect (10035: WSAEWOULDBLOCK: Resource temporarily unavailable) [D:/depot/bas/753_REL/src/base/ni/nibuf.cpp 4593]
[Thr 9452] *** ERROR => NiBufIConnect: non-buffered connect pending after 5000ms (hdl 114;:3299) [nibuf.cpp 4604]
[Thr 9452] *** WARNING => Connect to /H/<public ip>/S/3299/H/169.145.197.110/S/3299/H/notesdownloads.sap.com:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED(-10) {0002855c} {root-id=001517DB29811EDEB5FD50E3381320B9} [icxxconn.c 2715]
[Thr 9452] GUI T13_U1243_M0, 001, 2023-0044, CUB-051N, time=10:32:05, W1, program=STC_SCN_MAINTAIN, high priority, memory=0, tasks=1, appl info=, tcode=STC01
[Thr 9452] role: Client, protocol: HTTPS

entry.title: Re: Production Version
entry.content:
Hi,

Alternatively without having to use multiple production versions, you can select a different work center at the time of recording operation confirmation  by changing the default work center (CO11N).

You may need to enable selection of work center in your confirmation profile  via OPK0

entry.title: Re: BOM component selection
entry.content:
Hi,

you can check on the alternative item group functionality, refer the below blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/concept-of-alternative-item-group-functionality-in-bom/ba-p/13271091#:~:text=When%20there%20are%20several%20alternative,reservations%20are%20generated%20against%20orders.

entry.title: Re: There is a difference between the document total and...
entry.content:
Dear edy_simon,

This issue has been documented in SAP Note 3439522 which will be released soon.

The issue is supposed to be fixed in Feature Package 2405 of SAP Business One Version 10.0.

Be advised that the time-frame is subject to change without any further notice.

If you do not have any further question, kindly help to close this thread.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Add multiple entries to Outbound queue in SMQ1
entry.content:
Greetings all,

In ECC, I implemented the logic that creating an outbound queue ( which can check in tcode SMQ1 or table TRFCQOUT) and triggers the scheduling of a background job for this queue with a 5-munites delay. Upon the re-execution of this logic within the 5-munites, additional entries are appended to this queue name. 

The primary objective of this implementation is to streamline the process by consolidating multiple entries under a single background job. It helps to improve the performance by minimize the number of background job running parallel at the same time. 

Following the example of below sap document, everything is working fine in ECC system.

However, It doesn't working properly in S4 HANA system. Within 5-munite delay time, if this logic was executed again, then this queue name has gone immediately (cannot add a 3rd entry) and the background job is removed (cannot see it in SM37). 

I am still struggling with this issue 😞 and uncertain if there are any configurations for background jobs in S4 Hana system that could provide assistance 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/48/bb8094b22337e3e10000000a42189d/content.htm?loaded_from_frameset=true

 

Here is the logic implementing: 

 

* Get the latest entry of outbound queue into ls_qout (can use FM TRFC_QOUT_OVERVIEW_STATES)
* Based on ls_qout, we can get the start time of the latest queue (ls_qout-ftime)
* in order to know this queue is still deplaying for 5-munite or not 
IF ls_qout IS NOT INITIAL.
  IF ls_qout-ftime + 300 > sy-uzeit. "300 seconds = 5 munites
    lv_qname = ls_qout-qname
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.
 
* Set the new queue name if it cannot find any queue which is still deplaying
* And also set the flag lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'
IF lv_qname IS INITIAL.
  lv_qname = 'assign_the_queue_name'.
  lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
ENDIF.
 
* Initializing the TRFC Queue
CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_QUEUE_INITIALIZE' .
 
* Set the queue name for the outbound queue
 CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_SET_QUEUE_NAME'
    EXPORTING
      qname  = lv_qname
      nosend = space.
 
* Call tRFC without destination because I need it running locally in this system
 CALL FUNCTION 'rfc_function'
    IN BACKGROUND TASK ...
 
* Schedule the background job starts in next 5 munites for only the first one execution
IF lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
        lv_start_date = sy-datum.
        lv_start_time = sy-uzeit + 300.
 
        CALL FUNCTION 'START_OF_BACKGROUNDTASK'
          EXPORTING
            startdate = lv_start_date
            starttime = lv_start_time.
 
ENDIF.
 
* At the time of the COMMIT WORK, the qRFC manager creates a counter for the LUW
  COMMIT WORK.

entry.title: Re: syntax query
entry.content:
Hi Francisco,

the sysntax is almost the same. It differs  how:
FMS
Query-Generator
Post Transaction Notification
Uses Variables

I recommend this book

Mastering SQL Queries for SAP Business One by Gordon Du

regards Lothar

The users in our Test SF won't be aligned to that of Prod Teams, will the user mapping all the sudden create our Test SF users in Prod Teams (AD Azure)?

Thanks

During order confirmation you can split or do multiple confirmations , when there is a requirement to classify batches, if it is based on the confirmation.

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Hi, Thanks for the response.

Yes, we can ping the IP of SAP from our server. See the response from the ping.

PS C:\Users\Administrator> Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 169.145.197.110 -por
t 3299


ComputerName : 169.145.197.110
RemoteAddress : 169.145.197.110
RemotePort : 3299
InterfaceAlias : Ethernet 2
SourceAddress : 
PingSucceeded : True
PingReplyDetails (RTT) : 40 ms
TcpTestSucceeded : True

entry.title: Re: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access S...
entry.content: Hi, try adding WAIT before the 'Screen Exists Condition'. If that doesn't help, look at the screen recognition criteria and test the screen itself.

entry.title: Maintenance order confirmation time , can we consume material. same time , what are the perquisites
entry.content: Maintenance order confirmation time, can we consume material. same time, what are the perquisites. how to do configuration setting for that.

entry.title: Adding new fields to Characteristics catalogue.
entry.content:
Dear aATP experts, we have requirement to add new characteristics for Alternative base confirmations & Location substitutions.

Please help us with information How to add new characteristic (ex: Zip Code, Transportation Zone) to catalogue.

 

Thank you.

Satwik Joshi

entry.title: How to configure file store to a different location in crystal server 2020?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members,

I am currently running crystal report 2016 server. My current filestore location is at "C:\Program Files\Business Objects\BusinessObjects Enterprise 11.4\FileStore". I would like to re-configure to "E" drive. Would anyone please share me what all steps needs to be followed for this process?

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@Ethan_Dai No it won't create new users in Prod Teams. The mapping is always done on existing users from both sides.

If there are no matching email addresses between Test SF and Prod Teams then the mapping will simply fail. Therefore for this testing, you need to make sure that the users in Prod Teams exists as well in SF Test.

entry.title: Re: Error - Multiple lines are only supported for printing and in print view
entry.content: There is no need to reply on a 11 year old post that is already solved.

entry.title: Re: capture filename from azure storage adapter
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

can you help with above request?

entry.title: Re: Where can I find learning materials for SAP S/4HANA for group reporting?
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner ,

The community page link mentioned earlier is not working. Can you please provide the updated/correct link?

Thanks,

Niranjan Kamishetti(NK)

entry.title: I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP CDS View Not Permitted in the custom logic
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

For Credit Memo Custom Output forms Object developing purpose, we are trying to fetch some condition types of values from CDS view I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP. However, in the custom logic system giving us a error that "The use of CDS Entry I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP is not permitted".

By using eclipse, we also see that this CDS view is Projection View which is not allowed as base object for this entry type.

Therefore, we would like to know that instead of the mentioned CDS view, is there any other CDS view available from which we can be able to take condition types of values. Moreover, how can we achieve our required condition types of values (such as VAT, Supplementary Duty, TDS). Please let us know the solution.

Thanks and Regards.

Hasnat

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The NIECONN_REFUSED error indicates the incorrect router string. It's needed to verify with the SAP network team the correct router string from the configured system to SAP links. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Operation Configuration Webinar Series
entry.content:
WHAT IS IT ABOUT?

The SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar virtual Series is designed to offer in-depth insights into streamlining SAP Cloud ALM capabilities for practical implementation. Its primary aim is to provide valuable guidance on configuring managed systems, services, and activating operational use cases effectively.

The series covers various topics under the umbrella of operation and implementation capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM:

OPERATION

Episode 1 – Keep track of your integration well-being using SAP Integration & Exception Monitoring: This session delves into Integration & Exception Monitoring, bridging the gap between IT and Business. It explores the correlation of integration artifacts, granting comprehensive visibility into interface calls and message flows across diverse cloud services and systems. This deep dive into SAP Cloud ALM's capabilities expedites project implementation and ensures operational continuity in SAP's hybrid landscape. Santhana Krishnan

WATCH NOW

Episode 2 – Utilize Intelligent Event Processing within SAP Cloud ALM for downstream activities:

Here, we explore the onboarding (managed system configuration) of SAP SuccessFactors to SAP Cloud ALM. Also, focusing on Alert and Event management within the platform. Intelligent Event Processing efficiently handles events from varied sources, offering unified event processing based on rules, centralised event handling, and intelligent event correlation for the downstream activities like Email, Chat notifications, integration to incident management applications(service now and third party). Resmi K S

WATCH NOW

Episode 3 – Detect anomalies in your business and technical jobs with SAP Cloud ALM Job & Automation monitoring:

This session aims to guide users in configuring managed systems and services, with a specific emphasis on Job & Automation Monitoring. It facilitates a unified user experience and monitoring pattern across different products, proving especially beneficial in integration scenarios involving multiple products of the SAP Intelligent Suite. Venkatesh Ramachandran

WATCH NOW

Episode 4 – Ensure the smooth operation of your business KPIs with SAP Cloud ALM's Business Process Monitoring:

The Business Process Monitoring application in SAP Cloud ALM supports the detect-to-correct lifecycle of SAP Cloud solutions, ensuring smooth operations and improving the quality and performance of business process execution. Participants gain insights into addressing anomalies detected during monitoring. Stephanie Jerch

WATCH NOW

Episode 5 - Enhance visibility into your SAP BTP Applications using SAP Cloud ALM in lines of Observability:

Expanding its capabilities, SAP Cloud ALM now centrally operates SaaS applications and custom extensions on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). This includes tools that minimize the time to detect and resolve issues, offering observability for both custom-built and SAP BTP-based SaaS applications. Muthu Hariharan M

WATCH NOW

Episode 6 – Monitor your critical business application's availability and performance proactively with SUM in SAP Cloud ALM:

This episode elaborates on Synthetic User Monitoring, concentrating on web application performance and availability from a client-side perspective. It helps in proactively identifying performance and availability issues, guiding users through a seamless configuration process. In this episode, you will learn about configuring synthetic user monitoring scenarios along with the runner setup. @Christophe garcia

PART 1 WATCH NOW

PART 2 WATCH NOW

Episode 7 – Simplify change management by integrating various deployment tools and orchestrating them with SAP Change and Deployment Management:

This episode sheds light on overview setup and configuration of SAP Cloud ALM change and deployment capabilities, integrating various deployment tools to orchestrate smooth transport requests across the entire implementation landscape. Moritz Gysler

WATCH NOW

Episode 8- Monitor the availability of your hybrid landscape and its related events using SAP Cloud ALM's Business Service Management:

Discover how this solution, efficiently handles business services, cloud services, and technical systems. This offers overview of current service statuses, forwards events to monitoring apps, sends email notifications, and integrates with IT Service Management. Patrick Richarts Anne Joseph

WATCH NOW

Ep 9: Ensure governance across your system landscapes by adhering organisational policies at the host, application, and database levels with SAP Cloud ALM's Configuration and Security Analysis:

In this episode, we detailed into SAP Cloud ALM Configuration & Security Analysis. Discover how this solution helps in evaluating and enhancing the configurations and security méasures of an organization's IT infrastructure. It involves identifying vulnerabilities, implementing best practices, and ensuring compliance with security standards to protect data and prevent breaches. Hendrik Mueller

WATCH NOW

Ep 10: Ensure end users have clear visibility into the availability and performance of your SAP applications using SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring: This episode explores the benefits of transparency and performance in user interactions. Learn how Real User Monitoring supports monitoring request executions from different platforms with a unified user experience. Understand the importance of historical values in rating request executions and how it can help both IT and Business users. @Thomas holz

WATCH NOW

Conclusion

SAP Cloud ALM helps you to implement and operate intelligent cloud and hybrid business solutions.

You benefit from an out-of-the-box, native cloud solution, designed as the central entry point to manage your SAP landscape with content-driven guided implementation and highly automated operations.

SAP Cloud ALM is included in your cloud subscription containing Enterprise Support, cloud edition and in SAP Enterprise Support. Request you to look into the recordings to get deeper understanding of Operations capability within SAP Cloud ALM.

We have upcoming SAP Cloud ALM implementation webinar series, do register and attend:

Date

Topic

Registration Link

Feb 22nd

 Manage Projects Efficiently with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

Feb 29th

 Unlock the value of the new solution documentation in SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 11th

 Manage your processes and Run Fit-to-Standard workshops with SAP Cloud ALM

                

          Register

March 14th

 Orchestrate your test activities with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 21st

 Make use of Tricentis Test Automation with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 28th

 Benefit from Analytics in SAP Cloud ALM - from overview to traceability

          Register

April 4th

 Get the latest of Change Request Management in SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

April 11th

 Make use of S/4HANA Test Automation with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

Dave

Riyaz

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne Mar '24
entry.content:
Time to raise a toast to the SAP Dev Community in Melbourne. Let's take the opportunity to catch up as we get well into 2024. No agenda, no requirements, just come along and be involved in the way you would like.

To coincide with the SAP BTP Innovation Day in Melbourne on Thursday 21st March 2024 at 5:30pm at The Bank on Collins

 Ground floor/394 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000.

 

When you arrive, you can ask for a booking under "SAP Regulars Table" 😉

I am really looking forward to sharing this informal community get together. Pass the word around!

See you there.

Ben.

entry.title: Re: Add icon to Action label in RAP
entry.content: Adding icon is supported - please see V4 specific section "Rendering Buttons with Icon Instead of Text" in page I shared above for more information!
